extortion.description: General Micro Systems (GMS) is the rugged server company. The company is known as the industry expert in highest-density, modular,compute-intensive, and rugged small form-factor embedded computing systems, servers, and switches.We will upload corporate documents soon. Detailed project information, a bit of client information, financials, confidential military information, NDA, the most interesting thing here is confidential files of Intel corporation concerning Thunderbolt. And they don't care about such data leaked. We'll upload the files soon.
